TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Butch Beard sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1947, ryax sa tay 4 nqu tay 5, Butch Beard, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Beard mzyu Mari maki Breckinridge pqwasan biru. 1964 kawas hiya ga rasaw Bearcats sangka' pucing pinspngan. Beard ru Unseld ga blaq rangi' maki Louisville hopa pqwasan biru. 1965 kawas Beard s'aring rasaw Bearcats magal icibang. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: βutʦ~ʨħ βear* s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, βutʦ~ʨħ βear*, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja βear* mzju mari maki βreʦ~ʨkinri*ɣe pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ ħija ɣa ras~ɕaw βearʦ~ʨats~ɕ s~ɕaŋkaʔ puʦ~ʨiŋ pins~ɕpŋan. βear* ru uns~ɕel* ɣa βlaq raŋiʔ maki louis~ɕ*ille ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ βear* s~ɕʔariŋ ras~ɕaw βearʦ~ʨats~ɕ maɣal iʦ~ʨiβaŋ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Butch Beard sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1947, ryax sa tay 4 nqu tay 5, Butch Beard, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Beard mzyu Mari maki Breckinridge pqwasan biru. 1964 kawas hiya ga rasaw Bearcats sangka' pucing pinspngan. Beard ru Unseld ga blaq rangi' maki Louisville hopa pqwasan biru. 1965 kawas Beard s'aring rasaw Bearcats magal icibang. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: βutʦ~ʨħ βear* s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, βutʦ~ʨħ βear*, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja βear* mzju mari maki βreʦ~ʨkinri*ɣe pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ ħija ɣa ras~ɕaw βearʦ~ʨats~ɕ s~ɕaŋkaʔ puʦ~ʨiŋ pins~ɕpŋan. βear* ru uns~ɕel* ɣa βlaq raŋiʔ maki louis~ɕ*ille ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ βear* s~ɕʔariŋ ras~ɕaw βearʦ~ʨats~ɕ maɣal iʦ~ʨiβaŋ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
